author: doll-agent
content: UNBLOCKED — datetime/timedelta dtype landed via #343. Implemented isnat_datetime(arr: &Array<DateTime64, D>) and isnat_timedelta(arr: &Array<Timedelta64, D>) in ferray-ufunc::ops::datetime. Both return Array<bool, D> where each element is true iff the underlying i64 == NAT (i64::MIN). NumPy's TypeError-on-non-time-dtype contract is statically enforced via Rust's type system — non-time arrays simply fail to type-check. 4 unit tests cover skip-finite, all-NaT, mixed, and timedelta path. Re-exported via ferray-ufunc lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate.
